sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. real serving sizes are tiny because like other spice-adjacent seeds, practicality trims the headline numbers. real serving sizes are often small because some strong paper numbers are hard to cash out in practice. texture or prep can be a barrier because not everyone uses seeds consistently.

closing.summary: Caraway Seeds does have some solid upside, especially tiny food with serious nutrient density and easy to sprinkle into meals. but real serving sizes are tiny and real serving sizes are often small keep it from climbing higher. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
